posts.author: RyanSWS (Ryan Gottshall)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello All!

I have multiple people columns in my board to assign different people to different roles on a project. I want to be able to send a notification to multiple assigned people when a certain status is changed. It would be great if the “When a status changes to something, notify someone” automation would allow multiple people columns to be selected, instead of having to set up a different automation for each person.

Thanks!

posts.author: SteveS (Stephen F. Shedd)
posts.cookedHtml: Has anyone in the community found a solution for this?
